title: polypodium ordinatum
intro: Polypodium ordinatum, also known as Common Polypody or Polypody, is a species of fern native to the Northern Hemisphere, particularly in Europe, Asia, and North Africa. This plant has been utilized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects, derived from its saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Polypodium ordinatum are attributed to its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Polypodium ordinatum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
